name: Star and Sky: Sky In Your Heart
original_name: ขั้วฟ้าของผม
overview: Forced up to the mountains with his friends Mesa and JJ after driving while impaired, Dr. Kuafah meets volunteer teacher Prince. The two despise one another from the moment they first meet. Despite their differences, the more they argue, the more they come to understand one another.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] ขั้วฟ้าของผม | Sky In Your Heart
